ages.name: AGE OF EXPLORATION
ages.effect: You may discard 1 card from your hand to draw 2 cards.

ages.name: AGE OF NIETZSCHE
ages.effect: You may discard your hand and draw 3 cards.

ages.name: AGE OF PEACE
ages.effect: Ignore all actions (a).

ages.name: AGE OF REASON
ages.effect: Draw 2 cards. Keep 1, discard the other.

ages.name: AGE OF WONDER
ages.effect: When stabilizing, stabilize to 4.

ages.name: ALIEN TERRAFORM
ages.effect: You may discard any dominant cards from your hand and stabilize.

ages.name: ARID LANDS
ages.effect: Cannot play blue traits.

ages.name: AWAKENING
ages.effect: Preview the next age to all players.

ages.name: BIRTH OF A HERO
ages.effect: If you hold Heroic, play it now without restriction.

ages.name: COASTAL FORMATIONS
ages.effect: You may stabilize now to 1 over your Gene Pool.

ages.name: COMET SHOWERS
ages.effect: Discard 1 card from your hand at random.

ages.name: ECLIPSE
ages.effect: Cannot play red traits.

ages.name: ENLIGHTENMENT
ages.effect: You may discard up to 2 cards from your hand.

ages.name: FLOURISH
ages.effect: Draw 2 cards.

ages.name: GALACTIC DRIFT
ages.effect: On your turn: If you play at least 1 colorless trait, you may play another colorless trait.

ages.name: GLACIAL DRIFT
ages.effect: Cannot play face value (4) traits or higher.

ages.name: HIGH TIDES
ages.effect: Draw 1 card, or discard 1 card from your hand.

ages.name: LONELY AGE
ages.effect: Cannot play more than 1 trait on your turn.

ages.name: LUNAR RETREAT
ages.effect: Cannot play purple traits.

ages.name: MIGRATION SHIFTS
ages.effect: Cannot play face value (2) traits.

ages.name: NORTHERN WINDS
ages.effect: Draw 1 card. Then discard 1 card from your hand.

ages.name: PROSPERITY
ages.effect: At the end of your turn, you may choose not to stabilize.

ages.name: REFORESTATION
ages.effect: Traits in your trait pile cannot be swapped, stolen, or discarded.

ages.name: TECTONIC SHIFT
ages.effect: Cannot play green traits.

ages.name: TROPICAL LANDS
ages.effect: Cannot play colorless traits.

ages.name: THE BIRTH OF LIFE
ages.effect: Set your Gene Pool to 5. Play 1 trait each turn. Stabilize to end your turn.

catastrophes.name: AI TAKEOVER
catastrophes.stage2Effect: Discard all but 2 cards from your hand.
catastrophes.finalEffect: Set the face value of all colorless traits to 2. Ignore all colorless effects. (Excluding dominants.)

worldsEnd.text: Set the face value of all colorless traits to 2. Ignore all colorless effects. (Excluding dominants.)

catastrophes.name: DEUS EX MACHINA
catastrophes.finalEffect: Draw 1 card. Add its face value to your final score. (Max +7)

worldsEnd.text: Draw 1 card. Add its face value to your final score. (Max +7)

catastrophes.name: GLACIAL MELTDOWN
catastrophes.stage2Effect: Discard 2 cards from your hand at random.
catastrophes.finalEffect: Discard 1 blue trait from your trait pile.

worldsEnd.text: Discard 1 blue trait from your trait pile.

catastrophes.name: GREY GOO
catastrophes.stage2Effect: The player(s) with the most traits in their trait pile discard their hand and stabilize.
catastrophes.finalEffect: -5 points to the player(s) with the most traits in their trait pile.

worldsEnd.text: -5 points to the player(s) with the most traits in their trait pile.

catastrophes.name: ICE AGE
catastrophes.stage2Effect: Discard 1 card from your hand for each red trait in your trait pile.
catastrophes.finalEffect: -1 for each red trait in your trait pile.

worldsEnd.text: -1 for each red trait in your trait pile.

catastrophes.name: MASS EXTINCTION
catastrophes.stage2Effect: Discard 1 card from your hand for each colorless trait in your trait pile.
catastrophes.finalEffect: Discard 1 green trait from your trait pile.

worldsEnd.text: Discard 1 green trait from your trait pile.

catastrophes.name: MEGA TSUNAMI
catastrophes.stage2Effect: Pass your hand to the right.
catastrophes.finalEffect: Discard 1 red trait from your trait pile.

worldsEnd.text: Discard 1 red trait from your trait pile.

catastrophes.name: NUCLEAR WINTER
catastrophes.stage2Effect: Stabilize. Then discard 1 card from your hand.
catastrophes.finalEffect: Discard 1 colorless trait from your trait pile.

worldsEnd.text: Discard 1 colorless trait from your trait pile.

catastrophes.name: OVERPOPULATION
catastrophes.stage2Effect: Draw 1 card for each color (max 4) in your trait pile.
catastrophes.finalEffect: +5 points to the player(s) with the fewest traits in their trait pile.

worldsEnd.text: +5 points to the player(s) with the fewest traits in their trait pile.

catastrophes.name: PULSE EVENT
catastrophes.stage2Effect: Discard 1 card from your hand for each purple trait in your trait pile.
catastrophes.finalEffect: Discard 1 purple trait from your trait pile.

worldsEnd.text: Discard 1 purple trait from your trait pile.

catastrophes.name: RETROVIRUS
catastrophes.stage2Effect: Discard 1 card from your hand for each green trait in your trait pile.
catastrophes.finalEffect: -1 for each green trait in your trait pile.

worldsEnd.text: -1 for each green trait in your trait pile.

catastrophes.name: SOLAR FLARE
catastrophes.stage2Effect: Discard 3 cards from your hand. Draw 2 cards.
catastrophes.finalEffect: -1 for each purple trait in your trait pile.

worldsEnd.text: -1 for each purple trait in your trait pile.

catastrophes.name: SUPER VOLCANO
catastrophes.stage2Effect: Discard 1 card from your hand for each blue trait in your trait pile.
catastrophes.finalEffect: -1 for each blue trait in your trait pile.

worldsEnd.text: -1 for each blue trait in your trait pile.

catastrophes.name: THE BIG ONE
catastrophes.stage2Effect: Pass 2 random cards from your hand to the opponent on your left.
catastrophes.finalEffect: -4 if you have 4 or more traits of the same color in your trait pile.

worldsEnd.text: -4 if you have 4 or more traits of the same color in your trait pile.

catastrophes.name: THE FOUR HORSEMEN
catastrophes.stage2Effect: Discard 1 trait from your trait pile.
catastrophes.finalEffect: Discard 1 face value (4) trait or higher from your trait pile.

worldsEnd.text: Discard 1 face value (4) trait or higher from your trait pile.
